mac.notes: Universal Control: slide the Mac cursor off the right edge (or press ⌃⌥⌘) to drive your phone with the Mac's mouse and keyboard — no mirror window. Press ⌃⌥⌘ again to come back. Plus a Samsung Desktop-Mode fix so the DeX launcher appears.

android.notes: Universal Control: the Mac can now drive a cursor on your phone (with the Mac's mouse & keyboard) — a pointer overlay appears when the Mac takes control. Needs the “Bifrost screen control” accessibility service.
